name: MMR Vaccine Codes
description: CVX and CPT codes for measles, mumps, and rubella (MMR) vaccines. Used in childhood immunization (CIS) and adolescent immunization (IMA) measures. Requires 2 doses for full series.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Measles, mumps and rubella virus vaccine (MMR)
